claim_boundary: Automated part-to-view coverage map. It proves every generated CAD part is assigned to generated review artifacts and the per-part top-view and exploded-context contact sheets; it does not prove human CMF approval or pixel-level part segmentation.
release_rule: Every CAD part must have passing per-part top-view and exploded-context contact-sheet entries and at least one role-appropriate generated review view before automated visual review coverage can claim that every part is reviewable.
